California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
Patricia Anderson 
City Clerk 
1327 Foothill Blvd. 
La Canada Flintridge, 
Dear Ms. Anderson: 
CA 
91011 
April 20, 1988 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. I-88-135 
You have requested information on the campaign disclosure 
provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1:/ 
Because you 
are seeking general information, your request is considered to be 
for informal assistance.~ . 
In a telephone conversation with you on April 8th, you told me 
that many of the facts in your letter of March 31, 1988 had 
changed. 
Therefore, this letter does not address the questions in 
your letter. 
The purpose of this letter is to confirm the 
-telephone advice I gave to you on April 8th. 
~ candidate for city council filed incorrect or incomplete 
campaign disclosure statements for both preelection periods. 
I 
advised you that the candidate is required to file statements for 
both himself and for his controlled committee. 
He should file a 
Form 490, which is a combined candidate and controlled committee 
statement, for the first preelection period of January I, 1988 
through February 26, 1988. 
Also hp. is required to amend the Form 
490 which he filed for the second preelection campaign statement 
to cover the period February 27th through March 26th. 
1:/Government Code Sections 81000-91015. 
All statutory 
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. 
Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations 
Section 18000, et seq. 
All references to regulations are to Title 
2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations. 
Your letter states only a general question. 
Therefore, we 
1 er it to be a request 
informal assistance pursuant to 
lation 1 329 (c) (copy enclosed). 
Informal asistance does not 
provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or 
formal written advice. 
(Section 84113; Regulation 18329(c) (3).) 


• 
Patricia Anderson 
Page 2 
I hope this information is helpful. 
If you have additional 
questions, please call me at (916) 322-5662.

California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
Patricia Anderson 
City Clerk 
1327 Foothill Boulevard 
April 8, 1988 
La Canada Flintridge, CA 
91011-2137 
Re: 
88-135 
Dear Ms. Anderson: 
Your letter requesting advice under the Political Reform 
Act was received on April 4, 1988 by the Fair Political 
Practices Commission. 
If you have any questions about your 
advice request, you may contact me directly at (916) 322-5662. 
We try to answer all. advice requests promptly. 
Therefore, 
unless your request poses particularly comp~ex legal questions, 
or more information is needed, you should expect a response 
within 21 working days if your request seeks formal written 
advice. 
If more information is needed, the person assigned to 
prepare a response to your request will contact you shortly to 
advise you as to the information needed. 
If your request is 
for informal assistance, we will answer it as quickly as we 
can. 
(See Commission Regulation 18329 (2 Cal. Code of Regs. 
Sec. 18329).) 
You also should be aware that your letter and our response 
are public records which may be disclosed to the public upon 
receipt of a proper request for disclosure. 
JP:plh 
Very truly yours, 
'~eanne Pritchard
